overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking along a futuristic waterfront promenade in Night City, passing neon-lit stalls and NPCs before ascending to an upper level with a homeless encampment and grassy overlook.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered waterfront promenade with vending stalls

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the waterfront promenade beneath the elevated highway structure

notable_agents.action: pink-haired pedestrian walking past the camera toward the foreground
tattooed man with green hair walking in the opposite direction

entered.detail: massive concrete overpass with metal beams spanning overhead
body of water with industrial structures on the opposite bank
bright orange building with large vertical signage and neon lights
futuristic purple automated vendor stalls with glowing screens
mature tree with thick trunk and dense green canopy ahead on the path

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a covered waterfront promenade beneath a massive elevated highway. To the right, an orange commercial building features neon signage, while purple vending machines line the left side. Various pedestrians pass by, including a distinctive pink-haired woman and a tattooed man, as the camera moves toward a large tree in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza area with tree and stair access

events.description: approaching the concrete stairway leading to the upper level

agents.ego_description: continuing along the promenade toward the large tree and stairway entrance

notable_agents.action: muscular man with red cap and tactical vest standing near the tree base

entered.detail: wide concrete stairs with metal railings leading upward to the next level
orange concrete benches and planters along the waterfront edge
red and white striped plastic barriers blocking off a section

segments.scene_description: The character moves past the vending area into a more open plaza dominated by a large mature tree. The concrete stairway to the upper level becomes visible ahead. An NPC stands near the tree while the camera passes orange seating benches and construction barriers on the left.

events.description: character begins ascending the concrete stairs

agents.ego_description: climbing the concrete stairway to reach the upper platform level

entered.detail: metal handrail with wooden top running along the left side of the stairs

segments.scene_description: The character ascends the concrete stairway, with the metal railing visible on the left. The view opens up slightly as height is gained, leaving the lower promenade and waterfront behind.

events.description: reaching the top of the stairs and entering the upper platform area
approaching the homeless encampment with mattress and tent

agents.ego_description: walking around the upper platform exploring the encampment area and approaching the rock outcrop

notable_agents.action: homeless person sitting on the ground near a blue tent

entered.detail: red painted concrete flooring of the elevated platform
massive natural rock formation with grass growing around its base
square metal grate planter containing a palm tree
dirty mattress on a pallet with debris scattered around it
small blue camping tent set up against the wall

segments.scene_description: Upon reaching the top of the stairs, the scene opens onto a red-paved elevated platform featuring a homeless encampment. A large rock outcrop dominates the right side, while a mattress and blue tent indicate someone living there. An NPC sits near the tent as the character explores the area.

events.description: entering the tall grass area surrounding the rock formation

agents.ego_description: moving through tall grass around the rock outcrop toward the city view

entered.detail: overgrown grassy area with tall weeds and patches of red dirt
panoramic view of futuristic skyscrapers and buildings across the water
yellow monorail or transit line structure running horizontally across the view

segments.scene_description: The character moves from the paved platform into a dense patch of tall grass surrounding the rock outcrop. The camera circles around the rock, revealing a panoramic view of the futuristic city skyline across the water, with a yellow elevated transit line visible in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a neon-lit urban promenade beneath a highway up to a secluded, grassy overlook of the city skyline. It begins by tracking a character past purple vending machines and orange commercial buildings, weaving through pedestrians as the camera moves toward a large tree in the distance. As the character passes orange benches and construction barriers, the scene shifts toward a concrete stairway that leads away from the lower waterfront. The camera then ascends the stairs, leaving the bustle of the promenade behind to emerge onto a red-paved elevated platform occupied by a homeless encampment with a blue tent and mattress. Finally, the movement transitions from the pavement into a patch of tall grass, circling a large rock outcrop to reveal a panoramic view of the futuristic skyline and a distant yellow transit line.
